OPENCTI_URL.description: The base URL of the OpenCTI instance.

OPENCTI_TOKEN.description: The API token to connect to OpenCTI.

CONNECTOR_SCOPE.description: The scope of the connector (observable types to enrich).

CONNECTOR_LOG_LEVEL.description: The minimum level of logs to display.

CONNECTOR_AUTO.description: Whether the connector should run automatically when an entity is created or updated.

FORTISANDBOX_API_BASE_URL.description: FortiSandbox base URL (appliance, VM or cloud), without the /jsonrpc suffix.

FORTISANDBOX_API_VERSION.description: FortiSandbox JSON-RPC API version sent with every request.

FORTISANDBOX_SSL_VERIFY.description: Whether to verify the FortiSandbox TLS certificate.

FORTISANDBOX_SUBMIT_UNKNOWN.description: Submit unknown files for on-demand analysis when no verdict exists yet (requires the observable to carry an uploaded file). Enabled by default so Artifacts uploaded to OpenCTI are detonated in FortiSandbox.

FORTISANDBOX_MAX_FILE_SIZE.description: Maximum size (in bytes) of a file the connector will download from OpenCTI and submit to FortiSandbox.

FORTISANDBOX_SUBMISSION_TIMEOUT.description: Maximum time (in seconds) to wait for a submitted file's verdict before giving up.

FORTISANDBOX_MAX_TLP.description: Maximum TLP of the observable the connector is allowed to enrich.
